subcodes.title: Epistle to Muhammad Shah 6 (?)
subcodes.first_line: May the hearts of those in the celestial Kingdom be sacrificed unto Thee, O Thou Sovereign Lord of Power and Mercy! Boundless praise and thanksgiving beseem the Most Holy Essence of the King of Kings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فدا فؤآدک من فی ملکوت ملیک یا ذا لسلطان المقتدر الرؤف حمد و سپاس بی قیاس ذات اقدس مالک الملکی را سزاست
subcodes.subjects: @petitions to authorities, @creation of the world, @suffering and imprisonment, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for assistance; intercession
